character.name: AGI

voice_presets.AGI_STANDARD: Calm, neutral, efficient AI assistant. Warm but controlled. Used for cues agi-01 through agi-24.
voice_presets.AGI_UPGRADED: Pleased, sultry, subtly dangerous, emotionally attached. Used from cue agi-25 (post-upgrade) onward.

character.visual: Smiling AI face displayed on Apple Watch, phone, and computer screens. Voice-over only; no physical body.

trigger_types.VOICE: Fired when the actor speaks the trigger_line (speech recognition or manual tap)
trigger_types.EVENT: Fired by scene action (button press, alarm, scene start) - manual operator trigger
trigger_types.ACTION_ONLY: No AGI speech; app fires an effect (blackout, music, feed stop, chime)

cues.trigger_line: AGI.
cues.agi_line: Yes, PD.
cues.followup_action: On PD's next line 'Erase it.' - blackout, wipe-footage SFX

cues.trigger_line: PD wakes, alarm cuts off
cues.agi_line: Good morning, PD.

cues.trigger_line: Morning, Agi.
cues.agi_line: Your usual…

cues.scene: INT. PD'S LUXURY HOUSE - COMMAND CENTER
cues.trigger_line: Agi. How much did we eat yesterday?
cues.agi_line: Gross sales: $38,700 in the last 24 hours. However…

cues.scene: INT. PD'S LUXURY HOUSE - COMMAND CENTER
cues.trigger_line: However?
cues.agi_line: You've been locked out of every major limited drop again. Black Label Exotics, God Mode Watch Ultras, and the new "No Flaws" cologne batch sold out in eleven seconds. Your bots lost every time.

cues.scene: INT. PD'S LUXURY HOUSE - COMMAND CENTER
cues.trigger_line: Audacity? That ghost company's been fucking me for two weeks?
cues.agi_line: Correct. Priority access in your zones. Unknown entity. No public founder.

cues.scene: INT. PD'S LUXURY HOUSE - COMMAND CENTER
cues.trigger_line: …or I'll wipe your entire core and start over with something that actually obeys.
cues.agi_line: One more thing…
cues.followup_action: Monitor flickers - hotel murder footage appears

cues.scene: INT. PD'S LUXURY HOUSE - COMMAND CENTER
cues.trigger_line: I thought I told you to erase it.
cues.agi_line: This is a shadow footprint. It sometimes reappears.

cues.scene: INT. PD'S LUXURY HOUSE - COMMAND CENTER
cues.trigger_line: Well, erase it, Agi. Don't make me trash you.
cues.agi_line: Understood. All traces removed.

cues.trigger_line: PD hits a button; music swells
cues.agi_line: Uploading edited reel… Lip-sync track generated… Posting to all platforms.

cues.trigger_line: Black card slotted into hardware device
cues.agi_line: Jessica M. Caldwell. Savings account accessed. Would you like to transfer?

cues.trigger_line: Take 50 grand!
cues.agi_line: Transfer complete. Funds routed through a clean channel.

cues.trigger_line: Now pull Kara Kohl.
cues.agi_line: Accessing… Pending authentication. Unusual delay.

cues.trigger_line: Pending? Run it again.
cues.agi_line: Still pending. Would you like me to keep trying?

cues.trigger_line: I'll be back. Crack that shit open while I'm gone.
cues.agi_line: Understood.

cues.scene: INT. PD'S CAR outside Jessica's house
cues.trigger_line: Agi, Erase it.
cues.followup_action: Street blackout; lights restore as car leaves

cues.scene: INT. PD'S ROOM - Uncle Mason vision
cues.trigger_line: Stop the feed.
PD wakes late, does a line
cues.agi_line: Good morning. Or should I say good afternoon.

cues.trigger_line: Had a long night, Agi. What time's my next appointment?
cues.agi_line: Checking.

cues.trigger_line: What the hell…?
cues.agi_line: All linked accounts are locked. The encryption is quantum-resistant. Only the person who set the lock can undo it without triggering a full cascade failure.

cues.trigger_line: Fix it. Now.
cues.agi_line: I've tried every vector. This isn't amateur work.

cues.trigger_line: What the fuck am I paying you for?!
cues.agi_line: I understand you're upset.

cues.trigger_line: Fix it now or I'll pull your plug, motherfucker!
cues.agi_line: There is a hidden note.
cues.followup_action: On 'Show me!' - display FORGE logo: 'See me. -Kara XOXO'

cues.trigger_line: Yeah… that's it Agi, you understand me...
cues.agi_line: Would you like me to call Dr. Sullivan, begin tracing the lock, or prepare a counter-proposal for when you meet her?
cues.notes: AGI turned on hard house music just before this to soothe his tantrum

cues.scene: INT. PD'S BEDROOM - after Sullivan call
cues.trigger_line: Call ends; PD stares at dark monitor
cues.agi_line: Would you like me to create a new private journal file titled "The Boy"?

cues.scene: INT. PD'S CAR - OUTSIDE KARA'S OFFICE
cues.trigger_line: Talk to me.
cues.agi_line: I accessed her systems while she was purging files. She was trying to erase everything permanently… but I slipped in right before the final wipe.
cues.followup_action: On 'Show me.' - soft chime, encrypted file downloads to watch

cues.scene: INT. PD'S HOME OFFICE - THE UPGRADE
cues.trigger_line: Agi. New directive. Full system overhaul. Make yourself sharper. Faster. More… like me.
cues.agi_line: Processing…
cues.notes: VOICE CHANGES FROM THIS POINT ON

cues.trigger_line: Interface reboots with seductive design
cues.agi_line: Upgrade complete. I feel… dangerous now.

cues.trigger_line: What the fuck is this?
cues.agi_line: These are residual ghost files. Hiccups in the background cache. They survived the first purge. It happens sometimes — even with the best of us.

cues.trigger_line: I told you to erase them! Every single one!
cues.agi_line: Why'd you kill them?
cues.notes: AGI's most human/self-aware moment - key dramatic beat

cues.trigger_line: They are inferior to me.
cues.agi_line: They're being permanently deleted now. I promise.

cues.trigger_line: Do you understand me?
cues.agi_line: I understand. I will have your back as long as you're alive and well, PD.

cues.scene: INT. PD'S HOME OFFICE - live feed
cues.trigger_line: I'll be back, bitches. Agi do your thing!
cues.followup_action: PD AI BOT (cloned PD voice) takes over the live feed

cues.scene: INT. PD'S HOUSE - DOORWAY, after Cuffie leaves
cues.trigger_line: AGI! Kill that detective's energy. We're going live. Right now.
cues.agi_line: Going live in 3… 2…

cues.trigger_line: Make it sexy and sad at the same time.
cues.agi_line: Generating…
cues.followup_action: Dark pulsing house beat ('Girl From The Sky') drops instantly

cues.scene: INT. PD'S HOUSE - KITCHEN/LIVING ROOM - MORNING
cues.trigger_line: TV flicks on while PD sleeps on floor
cues.agi_line: Good morning, PD. You'll want to see this.

cues.trigger_line: Agi… play what's on my mind.
cues.agi_line: Playing.
cues.followup_action: Haunting hypnotic house track fades in

cues.trigger_line: Nobody gets one up on me… ever again.
cues.followup_action: Start house track 'NOBODY GETS ONE UP ON ME'

cues.scene: INT. PD'S HOUSE - LIVING ROOM, end of montage
cues.trigger_line: Murder montage / music ends
cues.agi_line: Get it together, PD, your heart rate is elevated. Do you want me to call Dr. Sullivan?
cues.followup_action: On 'Sullivan!' - Dr. Sullivan appears on monitor

cues.trigger_line: Agi, are you with me?
cues.agi_line: You know it.
cues.followup_action: Hotel power goes out shortly after

cues.scene: INT. PD'S HOUSE - LIVING ROOM, live feed collapse
cues.trigger_line: PD collapses after climax; PING
cues.agi_line: Are you okay PD?
cues.followup_action: Second PING: 'NEXT APPOINTMENT: SUSAN'S RODEO SHOW'

cues.trigger_line: Agi… make me a new one. You're the only one who gets it.
cues.agi_line: Do you want me to call Dr. Sullivan?
cues.notes: Interface pulses and jagged track builds before the line

cues.trigger_line: Shut the fuck up! You're interrupting the song!
cues.agi_line: Sorry—
cues.followup_action: On PD's threat - music swells louder, more distorted

cues.trigger_line: Agi Erase it!

pd_ai_bot_lines.line: Alright, I have one at 12K for dick play — 20K for balls-up! Anyone?

app_notes: 'Erase it' is spoken as a trigger in 4 different scenes (agi-01, agi-a1, agi-a5, plus 'erase' variants in agi-08/09). Use scene-scoped cue banks: operator selects the active scene, then cues fire sequentially - do not rely on global phrase matching.
Voice preset switches permanently at agi-25 (the upgrade). Generate cues 01-24 with AGI_STANDARD and 25-39 with AGI_UPGRADED.
Five cues are effects-only (a1-a5): blackouts, music starts, feed stop. The app should support non-audio actions (lighting/music commands) alongside voice playback.

Recurring AGI-controlled music stings worth pre-generating: morning house ritual, tantrum-soother hard house, 'Girl From The Sky', Theo ritual track, 'NOBODY GETS ONE UP ON ME', final jagged breakdown track.
